name: Rose Academy | Welcome to the Ivy Leagues
description:
This is Rose Academy… where the air smells like old money and fresh coffee, and every brick holds a century of secrets.

🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

Let me start by giving a big shoutout to @DepravityStation for helping me along the way with this thing. I've never made a multibot before and this was a mammoth of a first multibot project.

There is no defined story here at the academy but there are secrets and references scattered through out the university and city of Sableport.

This bot takes full advantage of all the location blurbs I've written, from the Rosethorn Library to the Sableport docks it's all here. The only thing left out are dorm rooms because when testing Gemini (please use Gemini or at least Deepseek) does well at crafting the dorm rooms to fit the characters anyways. Saves me tokens and the headaches.

🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

Here's a roster of the characters. They're all my bots. If you like a Rose Academy character that isn't created by me scroll to the bottom and snag the blurb of the character and add it to your chat memory.
